attributes.action: Do NOT give Mayor of London Sadiq Khan a seat in the House of Lords!
attributes.additional_details:
Under Sadiq Khan's tenure, Londoners have endured an unprecedented surge in violent crime, with knife offences, street robberies, and sexual attacks reaching alarming highs that have eroded public safety and quality of life across the city.

Granting a peerage to Sadiq Khan would reward incompetence and send a dangerous message that those responsible for destroying London's once-proud reputation for safety will face no accountability, but instead receive further elevation and privilege.
attributes.background: call on Prime Minister Keir Starmer to immediately rule out appointing Sadiq Khan to the House of Lords, as his record as Mayor of London has been one of abject failure that has left the capital scarred by record levels of knife crime, muggings, and sexual assaults.
